data.title: MetaMask: Added ENS domain name transfer function
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto wallet application MetaMask published a statement saying that it has added a new ENS domain name transfer function, which currently supports the Ethereum and Linea mainnets.

data.title: TMC's market value has increased more than 10 times in the past week, and the top 3 holding addresses are still in a loss state
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, TMC's market value rose to 7.8 million US dollars from the bottom of 700,000 US dollars in the past week. The community CTO gradually raised the price of the currency and successfully recalled the "missing person" DEV @traviscline. The current situation of TMC TOP3 holding addresses is analyzed as follows: 
The first address 3QnBe...ZoRie
On the first day of listing, 16,000 US dollars were invested to buy 31.32 million tokens at an average price of 0.0005189 US dollars. Now there is a floating profit of 220,000 US dollars, but the profit has retreated by 920,000 US dollars from the peak of the currency price; 
The second address Dd998...z4aAr
A total of 441,000 US dollars were invested to buy 26.79 million tokens at 0.01646 US dollars. Now there is a floating loss of 239,000 US dollars (about 54.2%), and there has been no selling operation so far; 
The third address 9QbKG...2jGwF
A total of The price of Bitcoin was US$532,000. The more it fell, the more he bought. As of now, the floating loss is US$324,000 (about 60.6%). This address once made a profit of more than US$1.2 million through SWARMS/BUZZ/arc.

data.title: Gate.io will launch BERA perpetual contracts, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io will launch the first BERA perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 6, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.
CoinGecko data shows that Gate.io has cumulatively supported more than 600 perpetual contract currencies and is the preferred platform for more than 20 million users worldwide.

data.title: Balance.Fun Key Nodes sales reached $80 million, and cumulative financing exceeded $110 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 infrastructure service provider Balance.Fun announced that its Key Node program has accumulated sales of over $80 million. Balance.Fun previously completed a $30 million financing led by top institutions such as a16z, Galaxy Interactive, and Animoca Brands. The total financing amount has now exceeded $110 million.
It is reported that Balance.Fun is an innovative AI + Web3 social and interactive entertainment protocol founded by Epal Labs. In the future, it will continue to promote the construction of decentralized networks, expand ecological applications on AI protocols, and help the large-scale popularization of Web3 and AI technologies.

data.title: Lingkong Games Denies Involvement With Oneness Labs And SHOWA Cryptocurrency
data.description:
According to Odaily, Lingkong Games has issued an official statement addressing rumors regarding Oneness Labs' acquisition of shares in the developer of "Showa American Story" and the launch of the SHOWA cryptocurrency. Lingkong Games clarified that it has never engaged in any business cooperation or equity negotiations with Oneness Labs. The company emphasized that all its financing and partnership information is solely based on official announcements.

Lingkong Games further stated that neither the company nor its game "Showa American Story" is associated with the so-called SHOWA token. The company has not granted Oneness Labs any rights related to the game, nor has it authorized any entity or individual to issue virtual currencies or financial products. Lingkong Games strongly opposes and resists the use of its game IP for illegal financial activities. Any virtual currency issuance related to Lingkong Games or "Showa American Story" is fabricated misinformation, and the company disclaims any responsibility for such actions. It urges players and users to remain vigilant to avoid unnecessary losses due to false information.

Lingkong Games also reserves the right to pursue legal action against Oneness Labs and related parties for spreading false information. The company calls on players, media, and partners not to disseminate or share inaccurate information.

Lingkong Games remains focused on creating and refining game content, committed to providing high-quality gaming products and services. All updates regarding Lingkong Games and "Showa American Story" should be based on official statements from the company.

data.title: Lingkong Games and its "Showa Umekoku Monogatari" game have nothing to do with the so-called "SHOWA Token"
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official information release statement of Lingkong Game about "Oneness Labs acquires the equity of the developer of Showa Story of the United States and launches SHOWA cryptocurrency", it is as follows: 
1. "Showa Story of the United States" is a game product of Lingkong Game. Lingkong Game has never conducted any commercial cooperation with Oneness Labs, nor has it ever negotiated equity transactions with Oneness Labs. The financing and cooperation information of Lingkong Game shall be subject to official announcements.
2. Lingkong Game and its "Showa Story of the United States" game have nothing to do with the so-called "SHOWA token". Lingkong Game has never granted Oneness Labs any rights related to the "Showa Story of the United States" game, nor has it authorized any organization or individual to issue any virtual currency or financial products. Lingkong Game firmly opposes and resists the use of game IP for illegal financial activities. Any virtual currency sales related to Lingkong Game or "Showa U.S. Story" are fabricated false information. Lingkong Game does not bear any responsibility for this. We urge all players and users to be vigilant and avoid unnecessary losses caused by false information.
3. Lingkong Game reserves all rights to pursue legal responsibilities for the dissemination of false information by Oneness Labs and related parties. Lingkong Game calls on all players, users, media and partners not to forward or spread false information.
Lingkong Game has always focused on game content creation and quality polishing, and is committed to providing users with high-quality game products and services. All dynamics about Lingkong Game and "Showa U.S. Story" are subject to the official statement of Lingkong Game.

data.title: Russia requires crypto miners to report income by the 20th of each month, prohibiting financial criminals from participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Russia has issued new regulations on cryptocurrency mining, stipulating that miners must report income before the 20th of each month, and only approved entities can operate. Those with a record of financial crimes will be prohibited from engaging in cryptocurrency mining activities. Through strict supervision and national miner registration, Russia is filtering out bad actors while providing a clear compliance path for legal miners. (Bitcoin.com) Earlier, the Russian Ministry of Energy announced plans to establish a single registration agency for cryptocurrency mining equipment, forcing all cryptocurrency mining operations to register. TASS reported that if the plan is implemented, cryptocurrency mining without equipment registered in the system will be "impossible." The plan, led by Deputy Energy Minister Yevgeny Grabchak, is part of a proposed amendment to existing mining regulations to better identify domestic mining activities, especially those held in areas where mining is not allowed.

data.title: Optimism launches a new Retro Funding plan with a reward scale of 8 million OP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum's second-layer solution Optimism announced the launch of a new Retro Funding plan with a reward scale of 8 million OP. The focus of this period is development tools (Dev Tooling). The rewards will be used to support builders who develop applications and tools on the super chain, such as compilers, libraries and debuggers. The time range of this period is from February 5 to July 31. Applications are now open. All applied projects must be open source. The rewards are expected to be distributed monthly starting from March.

data.title: BitMEX co-founder: US strategic Bitcoin reserves may have a negative impact on the industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes believes that the United States' strategic Bitcoin reserves may have a negative impact on the industry. He wrote in his latest blog that if the Democratic Party wins the 2028 election and decides to sell its inventory, it may be used as a political weapon or even overthrown.

data.title: Circle CEO Advocates For Programmable Digital Dollar
data.description: According to Odaily, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire recently expressed on X that the U.S. government should adopt a programmable digital dollar and smart contracts. Allaire's statement highlights the potential benefits of integrating advanced digital financial technologies into the national currency system.
